title: hieracium gigantellum subsp. gigantellum
intro: Hieracium gigantellum subsp. gigantellum, also known as Giant Hawkweed, is a flowering plant species within the dandelion-like hawkweed family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, making it a potential remedy for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Giant Hawkweed may include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Giant Hawkweed is often used as a topical application, and it can also be infused as a tea to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
